rulings.Case Title: KAZIM Z ACAR VS. JENNIFER E CRANE
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff Kazim Acars Complaint For Failure To File An Undertaking
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2017 line 1. DEFENDANT JENNIFER CRANE's Motion To Dismiss Plaintiff Kazim Acars Complaint For Failure To File An Undertaking GRANTED. Plaintiff's complaint is dismissed. No undertaking has been posted per February 28, 2017 order. Plaintiff fails to provide any evidence that he could not post an undertaking. To the extent Plaintiff's opposition purports to seek reconsideration of February 28, 2017, such a motion is untimely, improper and fails to meet the requirements of CCP 1008. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: EUGENIA SALGUERO ET AL VS. RICARDO ALVA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2017 line 2. DEFENDANTs RICARDO ALVA, GLADYS ALVA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges an agreement and breach of the agreement along with a claim for partial interest in the property based on the agreement. This claim is not barred by the CCP 319 as the last element of the claim, breach, has not occurred until 2015. Contrary to Defendant's argument, the recordation of the Deed in 1985 did not complete any of the causes of action as alleged in the First Amended Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: POTRERO LAUNCH AFFORDABLE LP VS. MARION E. WEAVER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2017 line 3. DEFENDANTs MARION WEAVER, ERMA WEAVER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer and is not uncertain. Plaintiff and its counsel are ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B in future, failure to do so may result in motion being treated as unopposed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VALERIE VALDEZ VS. ADELA MACMILLAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANT ADELA MACMILLAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDER, dismissal on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SRIKANTH JUJARE VS. BOXIA LI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2017 line 5. DEFENDANTs BOXIA LI, CHI WONG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, dismissal on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE VS. BESSIE WOO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 19, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANT BESSIE WOO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address the discrepancy between the allegations in paragraph 6 of the complaint and the Exhibit 1 to Complaint. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer. Exemption from SFRO is sufficiently alleged. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted as to the existence of Rent Board decisions, but not as to their content. = (501/REQ)
